{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Watchtower Stance
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Watchtower Stance]] is a movement or combat style used by [[Aila]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
